message:
refactor(freeze): Partial removal of unused Zig codegen path

- Remove Zig option from OutputLanguage enum (only .c supported)
- Simplify helper functions: jsValueType, jsContextPtrType, intType, etc.
- Remove Zig branches from emitBinaryArithOp, emitDivOp, emitModOp
- Remove Zig branches from emitNegOp, emitIncOp, emitDecOp
- Remove Zig branches from emitBinaryFuncOp, emitUnaryFuncOp, etc.
- Remove Zig branches from emitFunctionSignature, emitStackDecl, emitLocalsDecl
- Remove Zig branches from emitHeader, emitFunction prologue
- Remove Zig branches from get_arg0/1/2/3, get_super, inc_loc, dec_loc, add_loc
- Add deprecated isZig() stub (returns false) for remaining 80+ usages

Remaining isZig() calls will be cleaned up incrementally.
Verified: frozen fib benchmark produces correct result (9227465, ~24ms)
